basic_details.job_title: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Government Central Press, Gandhinagar (Sarkari Madhyasth Mudranalay)
basic_details.short_information: The Government Central Press, Gandhinagar (Sarkari Madhyasth Mudranalay) has released an Apprenticeship Recruitment Notification 2026 under the Apprentices Act, 1961. The organisation invites applications from eligible candidates for Apprentice posts in Book Binder and Off. Machine Minder trades.

application_fee.details: Application fee details are not mentioned in the notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 14 Years Maximum Age: 25 Years

selection_process: Selection will be based on the merit/eligibility criteria as per apprenticeship rules. Document verification will be conducted for shortlisted candidates.
how_to_apply: Prepare the application form along with required documents.
Attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, birth certificate and other required documents.
Send the application form to the prescribed address before the last date.
Keep a copy of the application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.government_central_press_gandhinagar_sar: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 Notification

content_sections.heading: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentice Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Government Central Press, Gandhinagar has announced vacancies for Apprentice posts in different trades. The trade-wise vacancy details are given below: :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates who fulfil the required educational qualification can apply for the apprenticeship posts. The eligibility details are as follows: :contentReference[oaicite:3]{index=3} Book Binder: Candidates who have passed 8th standard are eligible to apply. Off. Machine Minder: Candidates who have passed 10th standard with Science subject are eligible to apply. Note: Candidates having ITI qualification in Book Binder trade will be given one year relaxation in the apprenticeship period.

content_sections.heading: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 14 Years Maximum Age: 25 Years

content_sections.heading: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details are not mentioned in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on the merit/eligibility criteria as per apprenticeship rules. Document verification will be conducted for shortlisted candidates.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the Apprenticeship India portal. Complete registration on https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/ . Note down the registration number. Prepare the application form along with required documents. Attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, birth certificate and other required documents. Send the application form to the prescribed address before the last date. Keep a copy of the application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the name of the organisation conducting Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment is conducted by Government Central Press, Gandhinagar (Sarkari Madhyasth Mudranalay).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 31 Apprentice vacancies have been announced.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available under Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available trades are Book Binder and Off. Machine Minder.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentice Posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 8th standard for Book Binder and 10th standard with Science subject for Off. Machine Minder posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 14 years and the maximum age limit is 25 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to apply for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form is 31-07-2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates have to register on the Apprenticeship India portal and submit the application form through the prescribed offline process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Government Central Press Gandhinagar Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will be conducted as per apprenticeship rules and includes merit-based selection and document verification.
